arts.ttl: Sportmediaset: Inter and Milan face potential administrative oversight, players at risk of suspension
arts.sum: In the wake of a recent investigation that led to the arrest of 19 ultras, both Inter and AC Milan find themselves in a precarious situation. The Italian Football Federation (FIGC) has requested the case files, raising questions about potential consequences for the clubs and their registered members. Club Consequences Sportmediaset (via Calciomercato) report that for Inter Milan, a “preventive procedure” has been initiated by the prosecutor’s office. Consultants have been appointed to assess whether the club has severed ties with the ultras. If the club fails to demonstrate this, it could face administrative oversight. arts.ttl: Inter Ultras’ Intimidating encounter with Skriniar: “His voice was trembling, he was afraid”
arts.sum: Reports from Italy suggest Inter Ultras had a meeting with the clubs former defender, Milan Skriniar. According to the report from Calciomercato, the influence and pressure exerted by Inter’s organized supporters and their top representatives seemingly reached everywhere, even inside the locker room of Simone Inzaghi’s team. Beyond conversations with the head of the ultras, Ferdico, to convince the club to grant a higher quantity of tickets for the 2023 Champions League final, the Nerazzurri coach was forced to accept tactical suggestions from Ferdico during a period of poor results in the league. arts.ttl: Champions League | Inter v Red Star: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Red Star Belgrade, the second opponent for Simone Inzaghi’s Inter in this Champions League campaign, are preparing to face the Italian giants with a degree of confidence, having won five of their last six matches. Manager Vladan Milojevic is expected to stick with his preferred 4-2-3-1 formation for this crucial encounter. In goal, Ilic is likely to get the nod over Glazer. The defense is set to feature Seol and Rodic as fullbacks, with Dkusic and Dijga forming the central defensive partnership. The midfield will likely see former AC Milan player Rade Krunic partnering with Elsnik. arts.ttl: Inter vs Red Star Belgrade: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: After kicking off their Champions League campaign with an impressive draw at Manchester City, Inter will be looking to secure their first win of the league phase when they face Red Star Belgrade on Tuesday night. Red Star Belgrade, meanwhile, were beaten at home by Benfica to start their league phase campaign.

arts.ttl: Champions League predictions: Tuesday's matchday 2 fixtures
arts.sum: Inter, who made a huge statement on matchday one by stifling Man City at the Etihad Stadium, will expect to kick on and consolidate with Red Star Belgrade at home. Looking to get off the mark for the season, Manchester City travel to Slovakia to face Slovan Bratislava, while another heavyweight in Barcelona are home to Young Boys of Bern.

arts.ttl: Inzaghi Rotates Again – Seven Excpected Changes to Inter Starting Lineup Against Red Star
arts.sum: Inter manager Simone Inzaghi will ring the changes to starting lineup yet again when his team hosts Red Star Belgrade at the Giuseppe Meazza on the second matchday of the Champions League group stage. arts.sum: Inter Milan manager Simone Inzaghi is being considered by Manchester United as a potential replacement for Erik ten Hag.
